subcodes.first_line: The Beloved of the world, within this Most Great Prison, maketh mention of His loved ones, that they may rejoice in His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبوب عالم در این سجن اعظم احبای خود را ذکر میفرماید تا از فضلش مسرور باشند
subcodes.subjects: @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @effort; striving, @goodly deeds; actions
